basic_details.job_title: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Annamalai University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website annamalaiuniversity.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Annamalai University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant role at Annamalai University is July 17, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant position, candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Agronomy. This is the primary educational requirement for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000. This is a fixed remuneration for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted offline. You will need to download the application form, fill it out, and send it along with necessary documents to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Project Assistant recruitment at Annamalai University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role at Annamalai University will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at Annamalai University is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a specific period as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Annamalai University located?
faq.answer: Annamalai University is located in Chidambaram, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 608002.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive by Annamalai University.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. You need to download the form and submit it via post as per the instructions in the notification.
